text:
EXPLANATION: The cited paper is real, but the title has been modified (grafted) by replacing the actual title "Rapid and accurate calculation of protein 1H, 13C and 15N chemical shifts" with the description "Shiftx: chemical shift prediction from protein structures". The authors listed are correct for the real paper, but the title provided is not the official title of the publication.

LINK: https://doi.org/10.1023/A:1023812930288
FOUND_TITLE: Rapid and accurate calculation of protein 1H, 13C and 15N chemical shifts
FOUND_AUTHORS: Stephen Neal, Alex M. Nip, Haiyan Zhang, David S. Wishart
FOUND_YEAR: 2003
VERDICT: LIKELY
